name: Molecular weight
definition: Average molecular weight from canonical SMILES

name: Crippen clogP
definition: Wildman–Crippen octanol/water partition coefficient (calculated)

name: Topological polar surface area
definition: Sum of polar atom surface contributions (Ertl method)

name: Hydrogen-bond donor count
definition: Number of OH and NH donors (Lipinski definition)

name: Hydrogen-bond acceptor count
definition: Number of N and O acceptors (Lipinski definition)

name: Rotatable bond count
definition: Number of rotatable single bonds (Lipinski definition)

name: Aromatic ring count
definition: Number of aromatic rings in the molecule

name: Heavy atom count
definition: Total number of non-hydrogen atoms

name: Gasteiger partial charge mean
definition: Mean of per-atom Gasteiger partial charges

name: Gasteiger partial charge max
definition: Maximum of per-atom Gasteiger partial charges

name: Gasteiger partial charge min
definition: Minimum of per-atom Gasteiger partial charges

name: Gasteiger partial charge SD
definition: Standard deviation of per-atom Gasteiger partial charges

name: Max positive Gasteiger charge on N
definition: Largest Gasteiger partial charge on any nitrogen atom; 0.0 if no N is present
source: RDKit AllChem.ComputeGasteigerCharges restricted to N atoms

name: Most acidic predicted pKa
definition: Lowest predicted pKa across acidic sites; sentinel 14.0 if no acidic site detected

name: Most basic predicted pKa
definition: Highest predicted pKa across basic sites; sentinel 0.0 if no basic site detected (~19% of pool)

name: logD at pH 7.4
definition: Effective octanol/water partition coefficient at pH 7.4; Henderson–Hasselbalch independent-site closed form using clogP + predicted pKa values, neutral-microstate-only partitioning
source: Closed-form HH from clogP, pka_acidic, pka_basic

name: Cation microstate fraction @ pH 7.4
definition: Fraction of population in the net-positive microstate at pH 7.4

name: Anion microstate fraction @ pH 7.4
definition: Fraction of population in the net-negative microstate at pH 7.4

name: Zwitterion microstate fraction @ pH 7.4
definition: Fraction of population in the simultaneously protonated-acid and deprotonated-base microstate at pH 7.4

name: Neutral microstate fraction @ pH 7.4
definition: Fraction of population in the unionized microstate at pH 7.4
